title: umbilicus vulgaris subsp. patens
intro: Umbilicus vulgaris subsp. patens, also known as the greater orache, is a plant species within the family Crassulaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of greater orache include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat various ailments, including wounds, fever, and skin conditions.
